Localization.Description: Disks of a vurtual machine are attached or detached

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to attach disk "{object.value}" to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to detach disk "{object.value}" from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} detached disk "{object.value}" from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} attached disk "{object.value}" to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
